docket_entries.description: FRAUD, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAI, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT UA GENERAL ENGINEERING CHAN, HEI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-07-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-06-2025 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-15-2025
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAI, DIANA

MASTER CALENDAR FEE WAIVER HEARING ON AUG-20-2025 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF DIANA THAI'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT VIA ZOOM. THE COURT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF THAI, DIANA
FEES NOT PAID. COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIANA THAI ON AUG-06-25 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (D206)
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAI, DIANA HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 206
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-07-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. COMPLAINT STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
